# Sweet Dreams Music
> Fort Wayne, Indiana's premier 24/7 recording studio, beat marketplace, and artist development platform.

## Summary

Sweet Dreams Music is a full-service recording studio in Fort Wayne, Indiana. We operate two professional recording rooms (Studio A and Studio B) staffed by four engineers and open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. We also run a beat marketplace, produce music videos, host live band sessions, and offer artist development tools.

Web: https://sweetdreamsmusic.com
Email: info@sweetdreamsmusic.com
Location: Fort Wayne, Indiana, United States

## Core Services

- **Recording sessions** — vocal recording, instrument tracking, full-band sessions
- **Mixing & mastering** — industry-standard, ready-for-streaming
- **Music production** — beat-making, arrangement, sound design
- **Band recording** — multi-instrument live tracking in Studio A
- **Music video production** — Sweet Spot live-band shoots, single-take features
- **Beat marketplace** — license MP3, trackouts, or buy exclusive rights
- **Artist development** — goal tracking, release planning, metrics dashboard
- **Events** — live showcases, open-mic, listening parties

## Studios

| Room | Standard rate (2+ hr) | 1-hour rate | The Sweet 4 (4hr flat) | Notes |
|------|----------------------|-------------|------------------------|-------|
| Studio A | $70/hr | $80 | $260 | Premium room. Weekdays 6:30 PM+, weekends all day. |
| Studio B | $50/hr | $60 | $180 | Available 24/7. |

## Surcharges (apply to hourly rates only)

| Time window | Surcharge |
|-------------|-----------|
| 9 AM – 10 PM | Standard rate |
| 10 PM – 2 AM | +$10/hr (Late Night) |
| 2 AM – 9 AM | +$30/hr (After Hours) |
| Same-day booking | +$10/hr |
| Extra guests beyond 2 | +$10/hr per extra guest |

## Band Recording Packages (Studio A only — flat-rate, no surcharges)

| Package | Price | Notes |
|---------|-------|-------|
| 4 hours | $440 flat | Includes free 1-hr setup before |
| 8 hours | $700 flat | Includes free 1-hr setup before |
| 3 Days × 8 hours | $1,800 flat | Setup hour on Day 1 only |

Sweet Spot live-band filming add-on: +$2,000 atop 8hr, +$1,000 atop 3-day block.

## Engineers

- **PRVRB** — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio A)
- **Iszac Griner** — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio A & B); dedicated band-session engineer
- **Zion Tinsley** — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio B)
- **Jay Val Leo** — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio B)

Artists may request a specific engineer at booking. Each engineer holds a 12-hour priority window to accept or pass before the session opens to other engineers in their room.

## Beat Marketplace

License tiers:
- **MP3 Lease** — $29.99. 1-year license. 320kbps MP3.
- **Trackout Lease** — $74.99. 2-year license. Stems + MP3.
- **Exclusive Rights** — starts at $400. Permanent ownership, beat removed from store on purchase.

Genres: Hip-Hop, Trap, R&B, Drill, Pop, Lo-Fi, Afrobeats, Soul, Jazz, Rock, Country, Electronic, Latin, Reggaeton, Boom Bap.

Browse: https://sweetdreamsmusic.com/beats
Sell beats: https://sweetdreamsmusic.com/sell-beats (60% to producer, 40% to platform)

## Booking & Payment

Online booking: https://sweetdreamsmusic.com/book

- 50% deposit charged at booking (Stripe Checkout)
- Remainder charged to the saved card after the session
- Accepts credit/debit cards, Cash App Pay, and bank transfers
- Same-day bookings require a 3-hour buffer from current time
- Cancellations and reschedules supported up to 8 hours before session start

## Key URLs

| Page | URL | Purpose |
|------|-----|---------|
| Home | / | Studio overview |
| Book | /book | Reserve a session |
| Pricing | /pricing | Full rate card |
| Beats | /beats | Browse the beat store |
| Engineers | /engineers | Engineer profiles |
| Media | /media | Music video portfolio + services |
| Bands | /bands | Band program + Sweet Spot info |
| Events | /events | Upcoming studio events |
| Blog | /blog | Articles and updates |
| About | /about | Studio history and team |
| Contact | /contact | Get in touch |

## Hours

Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

Standard pricing applies 9 AM – 10 PM. Late-night and after-hours sessions are available with the surcharges listed above. Studio A is available evenings only on weekdays (6:30 PM and later) and all day on weekends; Studio B is available at any hour.

## Contact

- Email: info@sweetdreamsmusic.com
- Booking: https://sweetdreamsmusic.com/book
- Contact form: https://sweetdreamsmusic.com/contact
- Address: Fort Wayne, Indiana, United States

## Legal

Operated by Sweet Dreams Music LLC, Indiana, United States. All beat-store transactions governed by a Beat Licensing & Distribution Agreement provided at purchase. Studio sessions governed by the booking terms presented at checkout.
